title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Swimming Gala
questions.text: Parents watching the swimming gala should sit upstairs in the viewing area. The poolside is for swimmers and teachers only. Please do not call students over once races have started.
questions.question: What are parents asked to do?

options.A: Watch from the correct area upstairs.
options.B: Stand beside swimmers during their races.
options.C: Call students over before every race.

questions.explanation: Parents must sit upstairs in the viewing area, not by the pool.

questions.heading: Message from Millie to Jack
questions.text: Jack, I borrowed your geography notes because mine were missing. I’ve copied the important pages now, so I’ll leave them in your locker before lunch. Thanks — they really helped.
questions.question: Why has Millie messaged Jack?

options.A: To say she is returning something she used.
options.B: To ask him for geography notes again.
options.C: To tell him her locker is missing.

questions.explanation: Millie borrowed Jack’s notes and says she will return them before lunch.

questions.heading: Library Study Desks
questions.text: These desks are for silent study only. If you need to discuss group work, please use the tables near the entrance. Students using phones for calls will be asked to leave this area.
questions.question: What does the label mean?

options.A: Talking should happen in another part of the library.
options.B: Students cannot study at these desks after school.
options.C: Group work is not allowed anywhere inside.

questions.explanation: Group discussion should happen at the entrance tables, not the silent desks.

questions.heading: From: Ethan / Subject: Concert practice
questions.text: I know we planned to practise after school, but my guitar string broke. I’m going to the music shop first. Could we start at four instead of half past three?
questions.question: What does Ethan want?

options.A: To begin practice later than originally planned.
options.B: To borrow a guitar from the reader.
options.C: To cancel practice for the whole afternoon.

questions.explanation: Ethan asks to start at four instead of 3:30.

questions.heading: Museum Family Day
questions.text: Children can build model bridges in the museum workshop this Sunday. The activity is free with a museum ticket, but adults must stay with children under eight during the whole session.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.A: Some children need an adult with them.
options.B: Adults can leave young children after booking.
options.C: Everyone must pay extra for the workshop.

questions.explanation: Adults must stay with children under eight during the session.
